title: Lagging Behind
content: Hey **Bangkok Bank** ([BBL](http://marketdata.set.or.th/mkt/stockquotation.do?language=en&country=US)), the year is 2008 and IE is already 8.0beta. At least update the requirement page to look a bit nicer. ... Even better, sugguest the customers to use Firefox! [ Presumably, Microsoft is BBL's solutions provider. ]
